case_title: DAVID PARRISH VS. ELLIOTT ANTOINE et al

DEFENDANT IS TO RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT FOR AN AMOUNT, $245 WHICH DEFENDANT HAS ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
